form.formComment: Last start 6th of 10 at Wolverhampton on March 17 over 1400m, 5 len behind Cill Mocheallog with 61kg at $19. form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after five months 7th of 12 at Southwell All Weather on March 10 over 1000m, 4 len behind Toomuchforme with 57.5kg at $41.
